user.title: Heated zones
user.description: Map the Rointe climate entities for each zone. The hall comfort and eco temperature setpoints are detected automatically from the heaters (you can override them later under Configure if needed).

motion.title: Motion sensors
motion.description: Presence / PIR sensors used to keep zones warm while occupied.

openings.title: Door & window sensors
openings.description: Contact sensors grouped per zone. A group held open drops that zone to ice.

extras.title: Calendars, weather & alarm
extras.description: Booking calendars drive pre-heat. Weather drives the seasonal lockout. Alarm booleans cancel motion/manual heating when the building is locked.

fans.title: Ceiling fans & cooling
fans.description: Destratification / cooling fans via the Shelly Pro 2PM. The Shelly script owns all timing and safety; Home Assistant only decides when the fans are wanted and their direction. Leave everything blank to keep the fan feature off. Direction: master OFF = fans off; direction relay OPEN = forward (down air, summer), CLOSED = reverse (up air, winter). A live direction change always goes through the reverse button.

data.floor_temp: Floor temperature sensor (optional; else averaged from the hall heaters)
data.rointe_power_sensors: Rointe Effective Power sensors (heat-demand; auto-detected from the heaters if blank)
data.fan_fault: Fan fault (Shelly latched fault, if published)

abort.already_configured: Scout Hut Heating is already set up.

init.title: Heated zones
init.description: Update the climate entities. The hall comfort/eco temperature numbers are auto-detected from the heaters — set them only to override that.

fans.title: Ceiling fans & cooling
fans.description: Destratification / cooling fans via the Shelly Pro 2PM. The Shelly script owns all timing and safety; Home Assistant only decides when the fans are wanted and their direction. Leave everything blank to keep the fan feature off.

data.floor_temp: Floor temperature sensor (optional; else averaged from the hall heaters)
data.rointe_power_sensors: Rointe Effective Power sensors (heat-demand; auto-detected from the heaters if blank)
data.fan_fault: Fan fault (Shelly latched fault, if published)
